data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Element proximity improves usability and user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Strategically placed elements reduce navigation time.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified choice reduces decision time and improves user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Optimizing interface choices to boost efficiency.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements that are close to each other tend to be grouped logically.
data.technical_spec: Clustering related links/tools for intuitive navigation.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Users can retain about seven items in short-term memory.
data.technical_spec: Use chunking to avoid overwhelming users with information.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetically pleasing designs are perceived as easier to use.
data.technical_spec: Clean, minimalistic design with an emphasis on visual appeal.
